overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment from the game Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks down a sunlit urban boulevard lined with palm trees and towering corporate architecture, passing under massive red elevated walkways and turning into a narrower street beneath the Arasaka corporate complex. The scene features high-end ray-traced lighting, neon signage, and the iconic Arasaka tower dominating the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide futuristic boulevard with palm tree median

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of a wide sunlit street toward a towering corporate complex

entered.detail: massive twin-tower corporate skyscraper with vertical lines dominating the skyline
tall palm trees lining the right side of the boulevard
large red structural walkway connecting buildings overhead
modern glass and steel buildings with neon signage
futuristic angled street lamps with horizontal light bars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, sunlit cyberpunk boulevard with the massive Arasaka tower visible in the distance. Palm trees line the right side while futuristic buildings with neon accents occupy the left. The camera moves forward steadily along the concrete sidewalk, approaching a prominent red elevated walkway structure that spans the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate intersection with Arasaka building entrance

events.description: begins turning right at the street corner toward the Arasaka building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and executing a right turn around the corner of the Arasaka building

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab waiting at the corner near the Arasaka building entrance

entered.detail: black corporate building with large illuminated circular Arasaka logo and white neon text
red and yellow painted crosswalk lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the intersection dominated by the Arasaka corporate building with its glowing circular logo. Pedestrians cross the street as the camera turns right at the corner, passing a waiting yellow taxi. The tall white tower shifts to the left side of the frame as the red elevated structure now passes overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street beneath elevated red walkways

agents.ego_description: walking down a shaded narrow street beneath the elevated walkways, following a distant pedestrian

entered.detail: small manicured trees in planters along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Now walking beneath the massive red elevated walkways that cast shadows across the narrow street. The Arasaka building with its logo falls behind as the camera proceeds down the enclosed corridor. The tall white tower remains visible in the distance ahead, framed by the overhead structural beams. Small trees line the right side while the left side features dark building facades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a wide, sunlit urban boulevard into the shadowed corridors of a corporate district. It begins on a bright concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and neon-accented buildings, moving steadily toward a massive red elevated walkway that spans the street. As the camera reaches the intersection, it turns right past a waiting yellow taxi, shifting the perspective so the towering Arasaka building and its glowing circular logo move to the left of the frame. The scene then transitions beneath the heavy red structural beams of the elevated walkways, which cast deep shadows across the narrowing street. Finally, the camera proceeds down this enclosed corridor, flanked by dark facades and small trees, while the distant white tower remains framed by the overhead architecture.
